title: AP Works — EMD + Additional Security Validity Beyond DLP
text_english: The EARNEST MONEY DEPOSIT (EMD) AND ADDITIONAL SECURITY (for discount tender percentage beyond {{discount_threshold_pct}}% (default 15%)) SHALL be PROVIDED to the Department NOT LATER THAN the date specified in the LETTER OF ACCEPTANCE, and SHALL be issued in an AMOUNT AND FORM AND BY A BANK ACCEPTABLE to the Department. The EARNEST MONEY shall be VALID UNTIL a date {{emd_post_dlp_days}} (default 28) DAYS from the date of EXPIRY OF DEFECTS LIABILITY PERIOD, AND the ADDITIONAL SECURITY shall be VALID UNTIL a date {{additional_post_completion_days}} (default 28) DAYS from the date of ISSUE OF THE CERTIFICATE OF COMPLETION.

parameters.name: additional_post_completion_days
parameters.label: Additional Security Validity Beyond Completion Cert (Days)
